overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a hooded character walking from a narrow rocky canyon stream through a coastal landscape and into the ocean. The environment transitions from enclosed wetlands to open beach with dramatic cliff formations, featuring high-fidelity Unreal Engine-style graphics with realistic water and lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon with shallow stream

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow stream water between tall rocky canyon walls

entered.detail: steep moss-covered rock wall forming the left side of the canyon
steep rocky cliff face on the right side of the narrow passage
shallow clear water flowing over rocky stream bed
patches of grass and small purple wildflowers growing on the canyon sides

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed canyon with steep rock walls on both sides, following a shallow stream. The space is tight and intimate with limited sky visibility, surrounded by mossy rocks and sparse vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal approach with ocean vista opening ahead

events.description: exits the narrow canyon into an open coastal landscape with the ocean becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the terrain opens up to reveal the coastline and ocean ahead

entered.detail: calm blue ocean water visible through the opening between the cliffs
large rocky headland and cliffs visible in the distance across the water
sea stacks and rocky outcroppings rising from the ocean

segments.scene_description: The environment opens dramatically as the character exits the canyon, revealing a wide coastal vista. The right cliff wall falls away to expose the ocean, while the left cliff recedes into the distance. The ground becomes a dirt path through grassy terrain leading toward the beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach between rocky headlands with ocean shore

events.description: steps from dirt path onto the sandy beach surface

agents.ego_description: walking across the sand toward the water's edge with the ocean ahead

entered.detail: wet compacted sand leading down to the waterline
tall golden grasses growing on the sand dunes to the right
scattered weathered logs and debris washed up on the beach
distinctive natural rock arch formation on the right headland

segments.scene_description: The character walks onto a sandy beach bordered by tall grasses and driftwood. The ocean lies ahead with gentle waves lapping the shore, while rocky cliffs frame the left side and a distinctive rock arch is visible on the right headland.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow coastal waters with submerged sand and rocky cliffs

events.description: steps from sand into the shallow ocean water and begins wading
camera angle shifts to overhead view as character wades deeper into the water

agents.ego_description: wading deeper into the ocean water as waves gently lap around the character's robes

entered.detail: rippled sand patterns visible through the clear shallow water
broken wooden structure or shipwreck debris partially submerged

segments.scene_description: The character walks into the ocean, with water rising around them as they wade forward. The camera gradually shifts to an overhead perspective, showing the submerged sand ripples and the character's reflection. The coastal cliffs remain visible to the left while open water stretches ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic rocky canyon into a vast, open coastal expanse. It begins with the character navigating a narrow stream enclosed by steep, mossy rock walls and sparse vegetation under a sliver of sky. As the character exits the canyon, the environment opens dramatically, with the right cliff wall falling away to reveal a wide vista of the ocean and a dirt path cutting through grassy terrain. The scene then shifts onto a sandy beach scattered with driftwood and tall grasses, leading toward gentle waves and a distinctive rock arch on the distant headland. Finally, the camera ascends to an overhead perspective as the character wades into the ocean, capturing the submerged sand ripples and reflections while the coastal cliffs recede to the left.
